title: Jar Jar Binks Mod
description: Adds in Jar Jar Binks to Minecraft
body:
All it does is add in Jar Jar Binks to the swamp biomes and adds Darth Jar Jar to the Nether biomes.

Mob Drops: Jar Jar Binks drops Pufferfish Darth Jar Jar Binks drops Netherite Scraps.

Credits: Voice Over by https://www.twitch.tv/shadowdivexx Jar Jar Binks Skin: https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/jar-jar-binks-3326621/ Darth Jar Jar Binks Skin: https://minecraft.novaskin.me/skin/3596443381/darth-jar-jar
